# PERF-114 negative: intermediate conversion is not a pure memmove copy
lang: go
file: PERF-114-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

func convert(value int64) int64 {
	return value
}

// Convert maps each source value through a required element conversion.
func Convert(src []int64) []int64 {
	dst := make([]int64, len(src))
	for i, value := range src {
		converted := convert(value)
		dst[i] = converted
	}
	return dst
}
